title: cheilanthes dura
intro: Cheilanthes dura, also known as the "iron grass fern," is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Cheilanthes and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes dura include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herb in natural remedies. Cheilanthes dura can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal blends to enhance its medicinal effects.
